errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.popupBlocked: The sign-in popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailInvalid: Must be a valid email address
errors.emailTooLong: Email must be at most 254 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.displayNameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters
